short_summary: Xi in Pyongyang, El Niño confirmed
rationale: Xi's confirmed Pyongyang visit deepens the axis backing Russia, relevant to Romania's Black Sea security, while El Niño sustains commodity price risks; no new direct shock to Romania this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Confirmed visit deepens the authoritarian bloc supporting Russia, which directly borders Romania's security sphere via the Ukraine war and Black Sea dynamics.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Active El Niño raises risks of weather extremes and commodity price volatility, with potential agricultural and energy cost impacts for Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability at baseline level; indirect energy market risk but no direct impact on Romania.
